data.title: 2026 report shows growth in executive-level CISO titles, with evolving role scope and structures.
data.description: A recent report released in January 2026 by IANS and Artico Search sheds light on notable trends in the role of Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs). The report, titled the 2026 State of the CISO Benchmark Report, showcases changes in CISO hierarchy, developing reporting patterns, and broadening responsibilities. This insightful report provides valuable data for professionals in the cybersecurity domain.

data.title: Curiosity agency chosen for Nurri, debut campaign "Shake Ya Can," targeting fastest-growing RTD protein milkshake.
data.description: A new independent agency is celebrating its first project with the rapidly expanding Ready-to-Drink (RTD) protein milkshake brand. Based in Cincinnati, the agency Curiosity has been selected as the agency of record for Nurri, the popular protein milkshake. The announcement was made on January 15, 2026, via PRNewswire. Nurri has been identified as the fastest-growing product in its category and has garnered significant attention. Curiosity's appointment as the agency of record is a testament to Nurri's success and future growth prospects.

data.title: DEME receives second wind turbine vessel, Norse Energi, from CIMC Raffles Shipyard.
data.description: Today, DEME has received its second wind turbine installation vessel, Norse Energi, at the CIMC Raffles Shipyard.

data.title: Trump and Congress focus on rare earths; US gov't accelerating mineral independence. $2.5B Strategic Resilience Reserve bill introduced.
data.description: The U.S. government is intensifying its efforts to achieve mineral independence, with key moves from both the executive and legislative branches this week addressing the domestic rare-earth supply chain. President Donald Trump has urged negotiators to discuss potential price bottoms with allies and explore the option of imposing tariffs on rare earths and critical minerals with other trade partners. These directives follow a 2025 investigation revealing that the import of critical minerals poses a national security threat. In a parallel development, a bipartisan coalition in Congress plans to unveil a significant bill on Thursday to establish a $2.5 billion Strategic Resilience Reserve. This reserve would serve as a domestic stockpile of critical minerals, safeguarding the American economy from pricing manipulation and supply disruptions. The SECURE Minerals Act, spearheaded by Senators Jeanne Shaheen (D-NH), aims to enhance domestic mineral security and mitigate potential risks associated with mineral dependencies. For further details, consult Benzinga.com.

data.title: Correction made by Delos Insurance Solutions regarding analysis of LA wildfires one year later, identifying factors behind catastrophic fires. Original release issued on 15-Jan-2026.
data.description: A recent report from Delos Insurance Solutions, released on 15-Jan-2026, delves into an analysis conducted one year post Los Angeles wildfires. The study aims to uncover why certain fires escalate into catastrophic events while others do not. The revised report highlights key findings that shed light on this phenomenon. This analysis provides crucial insights for understanding the factors that contribute to wildfires, with a focus on the conditions that lead to their severity. The report serves as a valuable resource for policymakers and other stakeholders involved in managing and preventing wildfires.

data.title: Guardian, Nationwide, and Prudential won multiple awards at CI's Life Insurance Digital Experience Awards, with Guardian earning three medals and Nationwide and Prudential securing two each.
data.description: Guardian comes out on top with three medals, while Nationwide and Prudential each clinch two in the six digital experience categories. This announcement was made in New York on January 15, 2026, by Corporate Insight (CI), a prominent company specializing in competitive intelligence and customer experience research for financial services.

data.title: BitMine Invests $200M in MrBeast's Company, Beast Industries, as MrBeast Considers DeFi.
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies has announced a significant $200 million investment in Beast Industries, a company established by popular YouTube personality MrBeast.

data.title: La Mar collaborates with Selby's, Hog Island Oyster Co. & Sazerac for "Prime Time: Flavors of the Bay" during Super Bowl week in SF.
data.description: A lavish culinary event during Super Bowl Week is set to take place in San Francisco on January 15, 2026. Highlighting the region's renowned food and beverage scene, the event will bring together top culinary talents and drinks specialists for an exclusive gathering. With the world's attention on the Bay Area for the sporting event, this ultra-premium celebration promises a memorable experience for attendees.

data.title: Cerberus Capital selects Behavox for compliance; $70 billion assets firm opt AI solution for communications surveillance.
data.description: Behavox, an AI company specializing in converting data into valuable insights for business protection and improvement, revealed today that Cerberus Capital Management, L.P., a worldwide alternative investment firm holding around $70 billion in assets, has chosen Behavox as its provider for Quantum AI solution concerning communications monitoring. Behavox Quantum offers AI-infused communications surveillance for voice, chat, and email in various languages, boosting accurate detection of relevant information.
